releases.title: The Daily Show
releases.synopsis: The World's Fakest News Team tackle the biggest stories in news, politics and pop culture.

releases.title: Next Level Chef
releases.synopsis: Chef Gordon Ramsay scours the country for the very best line cooks, home chefs, social media stars, food truck owners and everything in between, all competing against one another with the goal of finding the food world's newest superstar. Joined by two elite names in the food world, chefs Nyesha Arrington and Richard Blais, Ramsay and his co-mentors leave no stone unturned, as they each recruit a group of talented chefs and take them under their wings. Ramsay and his friends attempt to bring out the very best in their cooks, as they all try to find "the one." Ramsay firmly believes that as long as a chef has the drive, talent and perseverance, he or she can make that climb to the top. Creativity, consistency and cunning are the recipe for success to make it to the next level, as the competitors adapt to the challenges waiting for them. Chefs compete for a life-changing $250,000 grand prize and the title of "Next Level Chef."

releases.title: Half Man
releases.synopsis: When Niall's estranged 'brother' Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives. Spanning almost forty years from the 1980s to the present day, this ambitious series will cover the highs and lows of the brothers' relationship, from them meeting as teenagers to their falling out as adults – with all the good, bad, terrible, funny, angry, and challenging moments along the way. It will capture the wild energy of a changing city - a changing world, even - and try to get to the bottom of the difficult question... What does it mean to be a man?

releases.title: Race Across the World
releases.synopsis: Race Across the World will pit pairs of travellers against each other in a race to reach the Far East without taking a single flight, with no smartphone in sight. Each contestant will only have the cash equivalent of an air fare to their destination to pay for their overland travel. If they run out, they'll need to earn more.

releases.title: After the First 48
releases.synopsis: After the First 48 revisits some of the most powerful cases originally featured on the First 48 and features exclusive interviews with detectives, prosecutors, defense attorneys, and families of victims. After the First 48 takes viewers through the dramatic and emotional inside story; from the investigation, to the murder trial itself, the verdict and beyond.

releases.title: Sugarcreek Amish Mysteries
releases.synopsis: Cheryl Cooper escapes to an Amish community in Sugarcreek, Ohio, to manage a gift shop after a failed engagement. Drawn into one mystery after another, Cheryl quickly realizes her sharp instincts and outsider perspective are exactly what this tight-knit community needs.

releases.title: Watch What Happens Live
releases.synopsis: Watch What Happens Live is an interactive series hosted by Bravo programming executive Andy Cohen, Bravo's Senior Vice President of Original Programming and Development, is best known to viewers as the host of the network's often explosive Watch What Happens reunion specials. Watch What Happens originally debuted as a live online show on www.bravotv.com. Watch What Happens welcomes guests from some of the cable network's most popular series, as well as other entertainment stars, to chat about pop culture and celebrities in the news!

releases.title: The View
releases.synopsis: The View is a live, one-hour daily talk show from ABC co-hosted by Whoopi Goldberg, Joy Behar, Sunny Hostin, Sara Haines, and Meghan McCain. It is the original forum in which real women discuss everyday issues, share their opinions and engage in colorful conversations.

releases.title: Ask This Old House
releases.synopsis: The crew at This Old House take on some pretty big projects, which means they can only work on one or two houses a year. But homeowners have a virtual truckload of questions on smaller projects, and the TOH crew is ready to answer. Ask This Old House solves the steady stream of home improvement problems faced by viewers - and the crew even makes house calls!

releases.title: Interrogation Raw
releases.synopsis: Interrogation Raw tells the stories of dramatic murders and other serious crimes through the prism of the gripping interrogations of the accused.

releases.title: On the Roam
releases.synopsis: On the Roam follows Jason Momoa as he travels the country chasing art, adventure, and friendship through the lens of craftsmanship.

releases.title: Pop Culture Jeopardy!
releases.synopsis: Pop Culture Jeopardy! is a brand-new twist on the classic quiz show's "answer-and-question" format that combines the academic rigor of Jeopardy! with the excitement and unpredictability of pop culture. Contestants, playing in teams of three, will need to be experts in categories from Alternative Rock to The Avengers; Broadway to MMA; Gen Z to Zendaya as they compete in a tournament-style event for the grand prize and ultimate bragging rights.

releases.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
releases.synopsis: After Jay Leno's second retirement from the program, Jimmy Fallon stepped in as his permanent replacement. After 42 years in Los Angeles the program was brought back to New York.

releases.title: NBC Nightly News
releases.synopsis: NBC Nightly News is the most-watched evening newscast in America, providing the very latest on the day's top stories and going beyond the headlines to add context and analysis to the most pressing issues of our time, both at home and abroad. We go to the heart of breaking news stories, introduce you to everyday people caught up in extraordinary events, offer in-depth reporting on health and medicine, cover international news as it unfolds and we profile those who inspire us to do better in our popular Making A Difference reports. The award-winning broadcast carries a legacy that spans more than six decades, beginning in 1948 - when NBC started broadcasting television's first-ever regularly scheduled network evening newscast.

releases.title: Countdown
releases.synopsis: The show in which two contestants engage in a battle of wits, competing against the clock in games of lexical dexterity and numerical agility.

releases.title: Good Morning America
releases.synopsis: Good Morning America is a two-hour, live program anchored by Robin Roberts, George Stephanopoulos and Michael Strahan. Lara Spencer is the entertainmnt anchor, and Ginger Zee is the chief meteorologist.

releases.title: ABC World News Tonight with David Muir
releases.synopsis: With unparalleled resources, World News Tonight with David Muir provides the latest information and analysis of major events from around the country and the world.

releases.title: TNA iMPACT!
releases.synopsis: TNA iMPACT! is 2 hours of fast paced, innovative, usually high flying, sometimes brutal pro-wrestling. Featuring a mix of stars you know and love and new, up and coming talent, it'll blow away the cobwebs and leave you wanting more.

releases.title: Killer Investigations
releases.synopsis: Detectives chase down leads, prosecutors go head-to-head with defense attorneys, and juries wrestle with life-or-death decisions.

releases.title: The Last Word with Lawrence O'Donnell
releases.synopsis: Drawing upon his experience as a former chief of staff on the Senate Finance Committee and as an Emmy-winning executive producer and writer of The West Wing, O'Donnell gives the last word and rewrites the most compelling stories of the day on The Last Word with Lawrence O'Donnell.

releases.title: The Elon Musk Show
releases.synopsis: Uncovering the story of how Elon Musk became the richest man who has ever lived.

releases.title: Wanmei Shijie
releases.synopsis: Born into a unique world where villages fight to gain power and control, the main character, Shi Hao, is a genius blessed by the heavens born under the poorest conditions. His clan, however, has a mysterious past. To rise and become the genius he is meant to be, the clan goes through every effort to aid his cultivation as they battle through fanatical monsters and engage in power struggles with other clans. His journey will bring him through unknown lands until he can become a person that can truly shake the world.

releases.title: Judy Justice
releases.synopsis: The Honorable Judy Sheindlin, retired Judge of the Manhattan family Court, brings her signature blend of sharp wit and wisdom, hilarious candor and unwavering honesty that has made her America's favorite judge for over 25 years, as she presides over real cases, arbitrates binding decisions and delivers what only she can: Judy Justice.

releases.title: All In with Chris Hayes
releases.synopsis: On All In with Chris Hayes, Chris Hayes delivers impactful stories that don't always make the front page. Drawing from his background as a reporter, Hayes goes on the road to uncover the truth by knocking on doors, digging deeper and speaking with people representing all points of view.

releases.title: The Hotel Inspector
releases.synopsis: Look who's coming to stay! Hotelier Alex Polizzi is on a quest to turn Britain's hotels of horror into relaxing retreats.

releases.title: Restoration Australia
releases.synopsis: This series follows the trials and tribulations of Australians restoring buildings to their former glory. As host Sibella Court follows the restoration process, she showcases the amazing Aussie battlers working to restore these heritage buildings to give them a new life and create a new home for themselves.

releases.title: Today
releases.synopsis: Today is an American news and talk morning television show that airs on NBC. The program debuted on January 14, 1952. It was the first of its genre on American television and in the world, and is the fifth-longest-running American television series.

releases.title: Scrabble
releases.synopsis: Scrabble is a captivating, fast-paced take on the global board-game phenomenon. In each episode, wordsmiths battle it out playing a series of addictive, word-based games to win points and add words to a giant SCRABBLE board in the center of the set.

releases.title: Anderson Cooper 360°
releases.synopsis: Anderson Cooper 360° (commonly shortened to either AC-360 or 360) is a television news show on CNN, hosted by the American journalist Anderson Cooper. The program covers a number of news stories of the day, usually through live or taped reports from the network's correspondents. The coverage can also include analysis from experts on the issues, commonly featured in or after the taped reports.

releases.title: Trivial Pursuit
releases.synopsis: The all-time classic trivia game Trivial Pursuit is reimagined in a question-packed entertainment format. Gameplay takes place on a giant version of the iconic Trivial Pursuit game board, as contestants battle it out over a range of play-along question categories to win wedges and beat each other to the center. The victor then takes on a dramatic finale against the clock to claim the big money jackpot.

releases.title: Pointless
releases.synopsis: Contestants have to try and score as few points as possible as they compete against one another.

releases.title: Temptation Island
releases.synopsis: In Temptation Island, four couples do the ultimate relationship test in twelve days, they are separated from each other, to spend time with 11 single men and single women, who try to seduce them on a tropical island. There are dates in the most exclusive places and at the campfire the partners get to see videos of each other. Is their relationship strong enough? Can they resist the temptation or are they too weak and what will be the consequences?

releases.title: Very Important People
releases.synopsis: Comedians are given makeovers to be transformed into someone completely new, and then have a fully-improvised interview with host Vic Michaelis.

releases.title: CBS Evening News
releases.synopsis: The CBS Evening News, a daily evening broadcast featuring news reports, feature stories and interviews by CBS News correspondents and reporters covering events across world.

releases.title: Inside the NBA
releases.synopsis: Inside the NBA is the postgame show for NBA on TNT broadcasts. The program features host Ernie Johnson with analysts Charles Barkley, Kenny Smith and Shaquille O'Neal. Occasionally, Johnson, Smith, Barkley, and O'Neal are joined by analysts Chris Webber and Grant Hill. The show has won nine Emmy Awards, Ernie has won three as a studio host and Charles Barkley has won two as a studio analyst.

releases.title: America Says
releases.synopsis: America Says consists of two teams of four guessing the top answers to fill-in-the-blank survey questions "covering every topic under the sun."

metadata.episode_name: Picnic Besties vs. The Gordon Family

releases.title: Deadline: White House
releases.synopsis: Hosted by Nicolle Wallace, this program provides in-depth reporting and dynamic discussions on the political stories driving the news cycle. Nicolle Wallace brings viewers the latest political developments of the day, in addition to interviews with leading newsmakers and influential politicians. Drawing on her years of experience as communications chief for President George W. Bush and senior advisor for the McCain-Palin campaign, Wallace provides political insight and clarity on where key decision-makers stand on complex issues.

releases.title: Regular Show: The Lost Tapes
releases.synopsis: Best friends Mordecai and Rigby work and live at a local park. Somehow, their mundane jobs always descend into surreal chaos, much to the annoyance of their boss and co-workers.

releases.title: RHS Chelsea Flower Show
releases.synopsis: Gardeners go for gold at the world's most famous flower show.

releases.title: Classic Movies: The Story of...
releases.synopsis: Classic Movies: The Story of... goes in search of the cinematically sublime. Those films that have transcended their era to enter the pantheon of greats.With each episode devoted to a single film, their story will be told with detail, affection, looking for the truth behind the myth, all the trials and triumphs that went into forging a classic. But this isn't simply history, the standard making of, it's about identifying those ingredients immortal scenes, performances, themes, luxuriant cinematography, art direction, special effects, music, even the power of a single line – that elevate a film to a new level.Hosted by Ian Nathan, guide us through the story from inception to legacy, supplemented with regular input along with special guest, with unique insight, historians who have devoted entire books, and visit to special location, where they shot or that served as  a key inspiration, bringing each of these films to life with a dynamic presentation. We are on a journey to find out not what makes a film good, but what makes it classic.

releases.title: Car S.O.S: Ultimate Countdown
releases.synopsis: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw count down some of their favourite moments.

releases.title: The Beat with Ari Melber
releases.synopsis: The Beat with Ari Melber delivers the biggest political and news stories of the day, with interviews and original reporting from around the nation. An Emmy-winning journalist, attorney and former Senate staffer, Melber cuts through the spin and the noise to tell you what's really happening. Real news, every night.

releases.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
releases.synopsis: A Bangers & Cash spin-off series that follows the journey of a vehicle purchased at a Mathewsons classic car auction, before being repaired, restored and then re-auctioned in order to try and find the vehicle a new home and loving owner. These genuine restoration projects, with varying degrees of difficulty, show how tricky it can really be to restore classic vehicles back to their former glory. Derek, Paul and Dave Mathewson are on hand to share their advice and observations on the variety of different jobs, which include an MG Montego Turbo with its engine in the boot, and a rare Lotus Elan S1 that hasn't seen a road for 47 years.

releases.title: Cang Yuan Tu
releases.synopsis: The story tells the story of Meng Chuan, the protagonist, who has made a vow to avenge his mother's death since he was a child and takes the Mirror Lake Daoist College as his starting point. With his resolute and fearless heart and decisive sword skills, he punishes the evil, destroys the demons, ascends to the top of the four Daoist Colleges, becomes famous in the Dongning Province, pays homage to the Yuanchu Mountain, and achieves a generation of gods and demons.(DeepL)

releases.title: Question Time
releases.synopsis: Topical debate in which guests from the worlds of politics and the media answer questions posed by members of the public.

releases.title: Morning Joe
releases.synopsis: On Morning Joe, the hosts Joe Scarborough, Mika Brzezinski, and Willie Geist engage in dynamic discussion about political news and issues important to all Americans. Morning Joe attracts a variety of guests, including top newsmakers, politicians and cultural influencers.

releases.title: Binnelanders
releases.synopsis: A South African Afrikaans soap opera. It is set in and around the fictional private hospital, Binneland Kliniek, in Pretoria, and the storyline follows the trials, trauma and tribulations of the staff and patients of the hospital.

releases.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
releases.synopsis: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hourlong weekday afternoon program, which mixes Tapper's interests with headlines from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. The Lead with Jake Tapper also concentrates on bringing stories that aren't found on front pages -- buried leads -- to the forefront. Tapper came to CNN from ABC News, where he most recently served as senior White House correspondent.

releases.title: Britain's Countryside Killers
releases.synopsis: This British series examines notorious murders that have had a lasting impact on rural communities in the UK. Each episode revisits a case that shocked once-peaceful towns and villages, highlighting how these seemingly idyllic settings were forever changed by violent crime. The series includes contributions from retired police detectives, forensic psychologists, and local journalists who provide detailed analysis of the investigative process behind each case.

releases.title: Jupiter Jones
releases.synopsis: A spin-off of ALLBLK's popular original series A House Divided, following fan-favorite Jupiter Jones - a sharp-witted lawyer tackling high-profile scandals and conspiracies while battling a haunted past. A thrilling mix of legal drama, betrayal, and redemption.

releases.title: Wonderland
releases.synopsis: A social experiment reality show about the cultivation of an ideal community, inviting 15 guests to Taohuawu, 15KM away from the city center, to live together for 21 days, creating an ideal society in their hearts. See how they live, work, and live in harmony in friction and cooperation. It is also a journey to explore the source of material and spiritual consensus.

releases.title: Watch What Happens Live with Andy Cohen
releases.synopsis: Bravo network executive Andy Cohen discusses pop culture topics with celebrities and reality show personalities.

releases.title: America's Newsroom
releases.synopsis: Watch 'America's Newsroom' on Fox News Channel - follow Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino Weekdays 9 a.m. - 11 a.m. ET as they bring you the news that matters to you.

releases.title: First Take
releases.synopsis: First Take (aka: ESPN First Take) is a weekday sports talk show co-hosted by Stephen A. Smith, Max Kellerman and Molly Qerim who are joined by regular contributors and special guests. The show includes daily sports news, interviews with sports journalists, athletes and personalities, spirited debates, and an assortment of other topics. The show debuted 7 May 2007 as "Cold Pizza".

releases.title: SEC Now
releases.synopsis: The flagship news and information program of the SEC Network -- ESPN's 24/7 multiplatform sports network devoted to the Southeastern Conference -- is SEC Now, broadcast weekdays from the network's studios in Charlotte, N.C. Hosted by Dari Nowkhah, the show includes a mix of sports coverage, in-depth features, insider access, and exclusive interviews with the movers and shakers of the conference's 14 teams.

releases.title: Monster Jam
releases.synopsis: The elite Monster Jam drivers push the limits of speed, skill, and power. Behind the wheel of custom-engineered monster trucks, they face off in high-speed races, jaw-dropping stunts, and freestyle chaos. Intense rivalries ignite and the stakes grow as each driver fights for the Stadium Series Championship.

releases.title: The Boys Season 5 Finale Faces Huge Backlash From Gen V Fans
releases.synopsis: The Boys Season 5 finale has left Gen V fans angry. Following the premiere of Episode 8 on Prime Video, many Gen V viewers have voiced disappointment over how the spin-off TV series was ultimately treated. releases.synopsis: The 36-year-old Golden Globe winner confessed she was never meant to be the star of the ABC musical drama, which aired for six seasons spanning 2012-2018

releases.synopsis: A MAGA influencer lashed out at pop culture podcast host Alex Cooper on Wednesday during her podcast over Cooper's recent pregnancy announcement. Allie Beth Stuckey , host of the "Relatable" podcast on BlazeTV, said during a new episode that Cooper's pregnancy announcement showed how the podcast host had "abandoned her old way of life that she is still promoting to so many women" by settling down and getting married. All Creatures Great and Small stars to 'reunite' for Channel 5 series
releases.synopsis: Two All Creatures Great and Small stars will reunite for the psychological drama on Channel 5.

releases.title: Times letters: ‘Lunacy’ of capping price of essential foods
releases.synopsis: Sir, You report that the government is considering freezing the prices of essential foodstuffs, and that the SNP has already announced plans to do so

releases.title: The Situation Room
releases.synopsis: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer and Pamela Brown: The command center for breaking news, politics and extraordinary reports from around the world.

releases.title: Studio C
releases.synopsis: One of BYUtv's most popular original series, the sketch-comedy show Studio C, brings you memorable characters like Scott Sterling, the Bisque Man, and the Awkward Avoidance Viking. Join the cast--including Whitney Call, Mallory Everton, Jason Gray, and Matt Meese--to enjoy more hilarious sketches and characters.

releases.title: Jian Lai
releases.synopsis: A common young boy, with a single sword, splits the heavens and overturns mountains and seas, rising to become an unparalleled swordsman and creating an extraordinary legend.

releases.title: Way Too Early
releases.synopsis: The fast-paced program brings viewers everything they need to know to start their days--from news and politics to sports and pop culture.

releases.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
releases.synopsis: Erin Burnett OutFront is an hour-long television news program hosted by Erin Burnett on CNN. The show premiered on October 3, 2011 in the 7PM and 11PM time slot to replace John King, USA. CNN said in 2011 they hoped Burnett's expected popularity would provide an "attractive" opening to an evening of "talk shows and news analysis". Erin Burnett, OutFront is broadcast live from CNN's Time Warner Center studios in New York City or on location from the site of a breaking news event, airing from 7:00 pm ET to 8:00 pm ET and also airs via tape-delay on CNN Philippines every Tuesday-Friday at 5:00 pm local time since March 17, 2015. The program covers a number of news stories of the day in a Count-up format, starting at #1 – most important and making it to #7 by the end of the hour. Burnett's program features taped packages from CNN Correspondents along with analysis and panel discussion.

releases.title: Escape to Florida
releases.synopsis: The fun-filled lives of the growing number of British and Irish expats who are turning their backs on grey skies and rising living costs at home and seeking a fresh start in America's Sunshine State.

releases.title: Беспринципные
releases.synopsis: Welcome to the Patriarchal. Funny and exciting details of the personal lives of rich Muscovites who, like everyone else, get into awkward situations. However, their situations are not the most ordinary... The wife feels guilty after meeting her husband's mistress. The husband is hiding behind the fictional daughter of a friend. And a friend pushes an assistant to commit treason, because that's what his wife wants. And this is just the beginning. In short, indecent stories about seemingly decent people.

releases.title: The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
releases.synopsis: Stephen Colbert brings his signature satire and comedy to The Late Show with Stephen Colbert, the #1 show in late night, where he talks with an eclectic mix of guests about what is new and relevant in the worlds of politics, entertainment, business, music, technology, and more. Featuring bandleader Jon Batiste with his band Stay Human, the Emmy Award-nominated show is broadcast from the historic Ed Sullivan Theater.

releases.title: Good Morning Football
releases.synopsis: Prior to the start of the 2016 NFL regular season, NFL Network has announced a new daily morning show, Good Morning Football, premiering Monday, August 1. Hosted by Kay Adams, Nate Burleson, Peter Schrager and Kyle Brandt, and Executive Produced by Michael Davies, Good Morning Football airs live Monday–Friday at 7:00 a.m. ET on NFL Network from CBS Broadcast Center in New York City. The three-hour live show is NFL Network's first show to originate from New York City in the network's nearly 13 year history. Good Morning Football will re-air Monday–Friday starting at 10:00 a.m. ET.

releases.title: GMA3
releases.synopsis: GMA3 is a news, health, lifestyle and shopping program.

releases.title: The 11th Hour with Stephanie Ruhle
releases.synopsis: On The 11th Hour with Stephanie Ruhle, Stephanie looks at the major political stories of the day and breaking campaign news.

releases.title: The 700 Club
releases.synopsis: The 700 Club is a talk show featuring guests, news and spiritual stories from a Christian perspective. News stories are often related to Bible passages. Fundamentalist preacher and one-time presidential candidate Pat Robertson hosts this long-running religious show.

releases.title: CBS Mornings
releases.synopsis: CBS Mornings offers a thoughtful, substantive and insightful source of news and information to a daily audience of 3 million viewers. The Emmy Award-winning broadcast presents a mix of daily news, coverage of developing stories of national and global significance, and interviews with leading figures in politics, business and entertainment.

releases.title: Today 3rd Hour
releases.synopsis: A news program intended to inform, entertain, inspire and set the agenda each morning. Each daily live broadcast provides current domestic and international news, weather reports, and interviews with newsmakers from the worlds of politics, business, media, entertainment and sports.

releases.title: Mysteries of Ancient Medicine
releases.synopsis: Strange, ingenious, and terrifying healing traditions from the ancient world; combining archaeology, forensics, and stylized reconstructions, it explores topics like toxic remedies, pirate cures, early acupuncture, and Roman battlefield surgeries.

metadata.episode_name: James Cook's Cup, Roman Army Hospital, Bamboo Scrolls

releases.title: Se tiene que morir mucha gente
The Pulse
releases.synopsis: Francine Lacqua provides commentary and analysis on the developing stories from around Europe along with a look-ahead to what's likely to dominate the US business agenda.

releases.title: CNN NewsNight with Abby Phillip
releases.synopsis: In CNN NewsNight with Abby Phillip, she delivers a thoughtful, sharp approach to the day's biggest stories.

releases.title: Al Rojo Vivo
releases.synopsis: Al Rojo Vivo is a news magazine that in one hour, takes viewers on a journey through the world. It is an "information paella" that offers something for everyone: local and international news, entertainment, fashion, live interviews, special investigations, human interest, health, consumer alerts and new technology.

releases.title: The Briefing with Jen Psaki
releases.synopsis: Based in Washington, D.C., The Briefing with Jen Psaki will pull from Psaki's decades-long experiences on campaign buses, in the Oval Office, at the State Department, and in the briefing room to dissect the most important stories of the day. Every day the show will aim to help viewers better understand the happenings in Washington and around the country, how it impacts their communities, and what leaders are doing to stand up for the people they represent.

releases.title: Rookie Truckers
releases.synopsis: It's one of the world's toughest and most dangerous jobs. And as a nationwide driver shortage threatens to stall Australia's economy, a new generation of Rookie Truckers is stepping in to take the wheel. Guiding them through this baptism-by-fire are Yogi, Steve, and Sludge—three long-haul veterans determined to pass on the torch before they hang up their keys.Facing blowouts, breakdowns, and extreme weather on the open road, the Rookie Truckers are pushed to the limit to earn their stripes—and a full-time job. They meet all kinds of colourful characters as they crisscross the continent. And along the way, fine-tune their survival skills, master the art of bush mechanics, and grow into the truckers who will keep Australia moving. Gritty and gripping, it's a high-stakes all-terrain journey packed with rugged landscapes, real drama, and storylines of mentorship and transformation.

releases.title: Bloomberg Markets: Balance of Power
releases.synopsis: In Bloomberg Markets: Balance of Power, host David Gura focuses on the politics and policies being shaped by President Trump's administration.

metadata.episode_name: Roestig Broodmes In M'n Oog Steken, Dat Lijkt Me Leuk

releases.title: Newsround
releases.synopsis: A children's news-magazine programme that has been on air since 1972 with a various range of presenting teams.

releases.title: NBC News Daily
releases.synopsis: NBC News provides viewers with up-to-the-minute national and international news.

releases.title: Laura Coates Live
releases.synopsis: In Laura Coates Live, Laura goes inside the story with a relentless pursuit of the facts. She is CNN's chief legal analyst, playing a central role in the network's extensive legal programming.

releases.title: Giro d'Italia Highlights
releases.synopsis: Daily highlights of Giro d'Italia on Quest every day at 10pm. Giro d'Italia is one of the most important races for a cyclist, and will see elite athletes from all over the world competing, and for the first time Quest will be showing action-packed highlights from each day's racing. The race will include six sprint stages, eight stages of medium difficulty climbing, five highly testing climbing stages and two individual time trials (for a total of 67.2km) including the stage that will close the 100th Giro, from the famous Monza racetrack to the Milan Cathedral.

releases.title: An Là
releases.synopsis: National, international and local news from the BBC Alba team.

releases.title: The Gaze
releases.synopsis: A cold contract binds the "Controller" Zhai Qiuyu and the "Dependent" Li Youen. What started as a transactional arrangement spirals out of control within the quiet walls of the medical room. When dominance turns into devotion, and a jest turns into a lifetime of protection—when I look at you, I finally see my true self.

releases.title: The Map of Truth
releases.synopsis: Master Chong Yat-san, a feng shui expert, gains fame through his channel exploring Hong Kong’s mysterious sites, but his rise is challenged by a skeptic influencer determined to expose him. As they encounter headless ghosts, vengeful spirits, and eerie rituals, the line between superstition and reality becomes increasingly blurred.

releases.title: SKZ Code
releases.synopsis: Reality show web series by South Korean boy group Stray Kids. It features the group taking part in different games and activities.

releases.title: The Source with Kaitlan Collins
releases.synopsis: The Source with Kaitlan Collins - Kaitlan Collins chases the facts, asks the tough questions, and connects with her sources in primetime.

releases.title: Katy Tur Reports
releases.synopsis: The latest breaking news, reporting and live coverage of the day's important stories; hosted by trusted NBC News journalists, these dynamic hours offer discussions with newsmakers, journalists and politicians.

releases.title: Shixiong A Shixiong
releases.synopsis: After being reborn in ancient times before the Great God-Conferment War, Li Changshou became a small cultivator.To survive in the cruel Primordial Times, Li Changshou tries hard not to accumulate any karma. He always plans thoroughly before doing anything and never allows himself to walk into dangerous situations. He hides his trump cards well, trains himself in escape techniques, refines poisonous pills, and masters mystical abilities.Li Changshou originally planned to remain hidden and safe in the mountain until his ascension to immortality. However, everything changed one year when his master brought home a junior sister…

releases.title: Gute Zeiten, schlechte Zeiten
releases.synopsis: Gute Zeiten, schlechte Zeiten is a long-running German television soap opera, first broadcast on RTL in 1992. The programme concerns the lives of a fictional neighborhood in Germany's capital city Berlin. Over the years the soap opera tends to have an overhaul of young people in their late teens and early twenties; targeting a young viewership.

releases.title: CNN News Central (PM)
releases.synopsis: News from around the world with Brianna Keilar and Boris Sanchez.

releases.title: My Staycation Boy
releases.synopsis: When Phut, a workaholic office employee, gets so drunk that he can't unlock his own room, he accidentally walks into the apartment of a stranger he mistakes for his best friend next door. The next morning, he discovers the truth — the man is Sunday, his friend's twin brother who has just moved in. What begins as an awkward drunken encounter soon turns into regular meetings every Wednesday, Sunday's day off. A carefree hairstylist who values life's simple moments, Sunday is the complete opposite of Phut, whose life revolves around work. Before long, an ordinary midweek day becomes the one Phut looks forward to the most. As love changes the perspective of a man who never knew how to rest, Phut must choose between a life consumed by work… or a heart that wants to pause with his Sunday.

releases.title: Check in to You
releases.synopsis: Two men who are so different! An unpredictable drama that started when his soul was changed by an accident

releases.title: Bon Cop, Bad Cop
releases.synopsis: In Bon Cop, Bad Cop, David and Martin team up for an investigation that takes them across Canada after the band chief of an Indigenous community in Gaspésie mysteriously disappears. They are joined by a new cadre of cops who are just as unorthodox as they are: Gabrielle, David's daughter, who has her father's stubborn streak; Joe, an intrepid Micmac police officer from Gesgapegiag; and Kim, a Sureté du Québec lieutenant who is generally skeptical of David's methods.

releases.title: Ana Cabrera Reports
releases.synopsis: The latest breaking news, reporting and coverage of the day's important stories.

releases.title: James.
releases.synopsis: In this documentary series, James Rodríguez, Colombia's legendary No. 10, shares details of his journey to football's elite and the game's biggest stage.

releases.title: Inside Politics
releases.synopsis: Dana Bash features the top political stories, sourced by the best reporters.

releases.title: Chris Jansing Reports
releases.synopsis: The latest breaking news, reporting and coverage of the day's important stories.

releases.title: 10 NEWS+
releases.synopsis: 10 NEWS+ will follow Network 10's 5pm local news bulletins across the country, offering viewers extended context and deeper reporting on the day's biggest stories. The 5pm bulletin remains a cornerstone of the network's trusted news offering, delivering the latest breaking news and updates.10 NEWS+ aims to redefine evening news by providing comprehensive analysis, trusted reporting, and long-form investigative journalism. The program will offer a fresh perspective on critical local and global stories, tailored for an engaged audience seeking in-depth news coverage.At a time when misinformation is rife, 10 NEWS+ is steadfast in its commitment to truth and transparency, delivering journalism with integrity, clarity, and purpose.Designed for Australia's evolving media landscape, 10 NEWS+ will integrate across broadcast, streaming, digital, and social platforms, ensuring content is accessible and engaging for Australians everywhere.The program will be anchored Sunday to Thursday by investigative journalist Denham Hitchcock and Walkley Award-winning journalist Amelia Brace, with Senior Journalist and respected news anchor Ursula Heger and National Affairs Editor Hugh Riminton leading coverage every Friday.

releases.title: The Weeknight
releases.synopsis: One-on-one conversations with politicians and newsmakers, and the breaking issues of the day.

releases.title: Helvetesuka
releases.synopsis: Hell Week is a raw, emotional and uncompromising reality series where 13 of Norway's most high-profile athletes voluntarily throw themselves into an extreme military simulation - inspired by the special forces entrance exams and the Norwegian Armed Forces' most demanding course.

releases.title: For All Mankind
releases.synopsis: Explore an aspirational world where NASA and the space program remained a priority and a focal point of our hopes and dreams as told through the lives of NASA astronauts, engineers, and their families.

releases.title: CNN News Central
releases.synopsis: Anchored by John Berman, Kate Bolduan and Sara Sidner, CNN News Central is the core hub of the network's best-in-class newsgathering operation during the day, bringing stories to viewers in real time, while offering perspective and context to key issues. Modeled after CNN's special election programming, CNN News Central uses similar technology and storytelling tools, and applies them to news well beyond politics. The immersive approach will showcase what CNN does best – breaking news, visual storytelling, and factual, impactful reporting.

releases.title: CBS News 24/7
releases.synopsis: Live news and top stories on CBS News 24/7.

releases.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
releases.synopsis: The latest national and international news, sport and weather.

releases.title: Mom's the Bride
releases.synopsis: In Mom's the Bride, each episode follows an adult woman who is planning her mother's dream wedding, with help from Erin Cahill and Hallmark. Flipping the script on the traditional "mother of the bride" role, the series honors the reciprocal love and support that can make the mother-daughter bond so profound. Viewers will follow the road to the altar from planning, to cake tastings, to dress fittings and the big day. Every ceremony is a love letter from a daughter to her mother.

releases.title: The Story Is with Elex Michaelson
releases.synopsis: The Story Is will feature live nightly panels and debates on set featuring a range of voices including attorneys Gloria Allred and Areva Martin, conservative talk radio hosts Larry Elder and Jennifer Horn, progressive podcast host Brian Tyler Cohen, former California GOP chair Jessica Millan Patterson and journalists Peter Hamby from Puck and POLITICO's Melanie Mason.

releases.title: CNN This Morning
releases.synopsis: Start your day with Audie Cornish bringing you the latest headlines and analysis.

releases.title: TODAY with Jenna & Sheinelle
releases.synopsis: America's feel-good morning show with big stars and sweet surprises; Jenna Bush Hager and Sheinelle Jones host an hour of heartfelt connection, inspirational stories, fun and laughs.

releases.title: ABC Prime with Linsey Davis
releases.synopsis: Providing prime-time context and analysis of the day's top stories, as well as in-depth reporting and storytelling from around the country and the globe.

releases.title: The Secret of the Lost Pearl
releases.synopsis: A pair of embroidered shoes kicks off the adventure of cultural relics expert Chen Youxi. A four-person team clashes repeatedly with tomb raiders while searching for the Lingxiao Pearl. Yet after securing the first Lingxiao Pearl, they realize they've stumble into an even greater conspiracy...

releases.title: Karna The Guardian
releases.synopsis: Karna lives as an ordinary boy—until the ancient demon Kalimba breaks free and spreads corruption across the world. When the darkness infects his mother, Karna's powers awaken, revealing his true identity: the Balancer, a Guardian born to restore harmony to the world. To save his mother and stop Kalimba's chaos, Karna must train to master the power within him—or risk losing everything.

releases.title: Perfect World
releases.synopsis: Born into a unique world where villages fight to gain power and control, the main character, Shi Hao, is a genius blessed by the heavens born under the poorest of conditions. His clan, however, has a mysterious past. To rise up and become the genius he is meant to be, the clan goes through every effort to aid his cultivation as they battle through fanatical monsters and engage in power struggles with other clans. His journey will bring him through unknown lands until he is able to become a person that can truly shake the world.

releases.title: Lobo, Morir Matando
releases.synopsis: Tras un evento trágico, el exdetective Lobo Rosales debe proteger a Renata, la hija de la mujer que alguna vez amó. Juntos cruzan la frontera y forjan un vínculo frágil que pondrá a prueba los límites de la lealtad, el amor y la redención.

releases.title: След Чикатило
releases.synopsis: In the early 2000s, southern Russia was rocked by a series of horrific attacks on the Don highway and other roads. Detectives are on the trail of a gang of "Amazons" led by the mysterious Smallpox. Detectives will have to rescue the hostages and stop the criminals, as well as find out how the girls are connected to the Chikatilo case.

releases.title: Zhan Zhao Adventures
releases.synopsis: Zhan Zhao, a fourth-ranked imperial guard, embarks on a solo investigation after receiving evidence of a cold case. Along the way, he encounters the strong-willed Miss Huo Linglong and the justice-driven Bai Yutang. The three like-minded companions join forces to uncover clues, uphold justice, and capture criminals. Together, they work to expose a dangerous web of power that has infiltrated both the court and the martial world, ultimately restoring peace to the people.

releases.title: America Reports
releases.synopsis: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts

releases.title: American Agenda
releases.synopsis: American Agenda with hosts Bob Brooks & Katrina Szish is a live, fast-paced look at national news and international events. The program brings viewers the latest from Washington, with insightful analysis from lawmakers and experts, and media reports from New York and around the globe.

releases.title: Доедешь – напиши
releases.synopsis: The daily lives of people from different countries and unusual tourist routes. A vibrant reality show featuring Russian celebrities.

releases.title: Daughter of Fortune
releases.synopsis: Shen Zhinian and her elder legitimate sister, Shen Nanqiao, are both reborn. Determined to escape the tragic fate that befell her in their previous life, Shen Nanqiao forces Zhinian into the imperial palace in her place. Thrown into the treacherous world of the harem, Shen Zhinian carefully plots every move, striking back with brilliance and strategy. Her intelligence soon captures the attention of Emperor Nangong Xuanyu. As schemes and conspiracies unfold across both the imperial court and the inner palace, the two move from mutual suspicion to genuine affection, joining hands to overcome the dangerous turmoil surrounding the throne.

releases.title: LightKeeper of Jigu Temple
releases.synopsis: During the era of warlord chaos, an old medic and drunkard known as Old Drunkard returns to his hometown and takes shelter in the Bone Resting Temple. There, he saves a widow, Ru Ling, and exposes the sinister conspiracy behind the "Mountain God Child Sacrifice," eventually taking up the mantle of the Light Keeper. He takes the wayward youth Dong Sheng under his wing, helps him crack an arms smuggling case, and rescues Qiu Ying from being offered as a living sacrifice. With wit and grit, he battles a vicious cult and liberates imprisoned patriots. In the end, Old Drunkard passes away in peace, and every life he saved goes on to devote themselves to the revolution.

releases.title: Good Mythical Morning
releases.synopsis: Morning talk show created by Rhett McLaughlin and Charles Lincoln 'Link' Neal contains loads of laughter and insanity, known for this quote: "We do this, so you don't have to."

releases.title: ABC News Live
releases.synopsis: ABC News Live will bring streaming viewers the latest headlines, compelling stories, interviews and roundtable discussions.

releases.title: ABC News Live Reports
releases.synopsis: ABC News Live Reports is the rare national newscast based in Los Angeles, in what the network is billing as an "outside the Beltway" focus on politics for the 2024 election cycle.

releases.title: Amanpour & Co.
releases.synopsis: Featuring conversations with global leaders and decision makers on the issues affecting the world today, Amanpour and Company adds to the long tradition of public affairs programming that has been a hallmark of public media for decades.

releases.title: ABC News Live First
releases.synopsis: ABC News Live First will bring streaming viewers the latest headlines, compelling stories, interviews and roundtable discussions.

releases.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
releases.synopsis: Reporting that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends.

releases.title: Bloomberg: The Close
releases.synopsis: Alix Steel, Romaine Bostick and Scarlet Fu own the market-moving breaking news around the closing bell; a synthesis focusing on the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street.

releases.title: Corazón de Oro
releases.synopsis: Luz lives a modest life with her daughter Catalina, who is ashamed of her humble origins and pretends to be wealthy while dreaming of a life of luxury. Miguel Ángel, a successful blind lawyer, struggles to earn the approval of his powerful father, the owner of the prestigious Arango-Nova vineyards.Years ago, a scandal at the estate tore Luz and Miguel Ángel apart, cutting short a love that never truly faded. An unexpected reunion forces Luz to return to the vineyards with Catalina, reopening old wounds and bringing long-buried secrets to light.As Luz confronts lingering feelings, Catalina, blinded by ambition, pushes herself to dangerous extremes. Amid betrayal and sacrifice, mother and daughter become entangled in a battle where love and ambition put everything at risk.

releases.title: Insight with Haslinda Amin
releases.synopsis: In a volatile and unpredictable world, the show will be the definitive guide for the global news audience to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day. With news making executives, officials and thought-leaders from the world of business, politics and academia we will explore a story through probing interviews and nuanced conversations. The hour of programming will also highlight the most relevant stories from India which is currently one of the hottest investment destinations, but also has compelling stories that play into the Bloomberg's priority issues such as Climate change, Diversity and Technological innovation.

releases.title: Jeopardy!
releases.synopsis: America's favorite quiz show where contestants are presented with general knowledge clues in the form of answers, and must phrase their responses in question form.

releases.title: The Arena with Kasie Hunt
releases.synopsis: Kasie Hunt brings key players into the arena for sharp analysis and panel discussion on the latest news in politics and culture.

releases.title: Förrädarna
releases.synopsis: Actor Dragomir Mrsic leads the program where board games meet reality. Get ready for a nerve-wracking murder mystery game where we, the viewers, become witnesses behind the scenes. 18 participants, completely unaware of each other, arrive at Häringe Castle and are put to tough tests in the psychological game. Who in the group can be trusted, which blacksmiths cheat and above all who are the Traitors?

releases.title: 10's Late News
releases.synopsis: Ursula Heger, a senior journalist at 10 News First, will anchor the newly reintroduced news bulletin. Having been with the network since 2011, Heger has covered significant events, including the Ukraine conflict, the demise of Queen Elizabeth II, and other critical global stories.Channel 10 states the bulletin aims to offer viewers a detailed wrap-up of the day's major stories, delivered in a digital-first format that allows audiences to tune in from any device, at their convenience.

releases.title: Dreams of Freedom
releases.synopsis: Begoña Montes is a woman who lives trapped in a toxic marriage and seeks the long-awaited freedom in Spain in 1958.

releases.title: Coronation Street
releases.synopsis: The residents of Coronation Street are ordinary, working-class people, and the show follows them through regular social and family interactions at home, in the workplace, and in their local pub, the Rovers Return Inn. Britain's longest-running soap.

releases.title: Goede Tijden, Slechte Tijden
releases.synopsis: Goede tijden, slechte tijden, also known as GTST, is the longest-running Dutch soap opera,  revolving around the lives of the families Alberts, Sanders, De Jong, Van Houten and Bouwhuis. It all takes place in the fictional town of Meerdijk.

releases.title: Hacks
releases.synopsis: Explore a dark mentorship that forms between Deborah Vance, a legendary Las Vegas comedian, and an entitled, outcast 25-year-old.

releases.title: EastEnders
releases.synopsis: The everyday lives of working-class residents of Albert Square, a traditional Victorian square of terrace houses surrounding a park in the East End of London's Walford borough.

releases.title: The Terror
releases.synopsis: A chilling anthology series featuring stories of people in terrifying situations inspired by true historical events.

releases.title: The One I Love
releases.synopsis: Erkan Aldur, a young man from a wealthy Istanbul family, is stationed in eastern Turkey to complete his mandatory military service in a remote, earthquake-stricken region. In this harsh and unfamiliar landscape, he meets Dicle, a young woman who has lived her entire life in the village and whose world is shaped by tradition, family, and community. Their encounter brings together two very different worlds, setting in motion a journey of change, resilience, and unexpected connection. As Dicle steps into the unfamiliar and Erkan faces new responsibilities, their story unfolds into a heartfelt and transformative tale of love and courage, that bridges even the widest divides

releases.title: Bedre sex
releases.synopsis: Janne Formoe and Triana Iglesias embark on a thrilling journey of discovery into the world of sex. Here they meet people who openly share their sexual experiences, and colorful experts who give them deeper knowledge about sex, sexuality, and sensuality.

releases.title: Hot Ones
releases.synopsis: The show with hot questions and even hotter wings invites a famous guest over to eat and then interviews them while they're struggling through the heat.

metadata.episode_name: Tim Howard Makes the Save While Eating Spicy Hot Wings

releases.title: Ghosts
releases.synopsis: Samantha and Jay throw caution to the wind when they convert their recently inherited country estate into a bed-and-breakfast. Call it mislaid plans. Not only is the place falling apart, but it’s also inhabited by spirits of previous residents -- whom only Samantha can see and hear.

releases.title: Your Friends & Neighbors
releases.synopsis: When a financial titan suddenly finds himself divorced and jobless, he starts robbing his wealthy neighbors to stay afloat. Stealing from his own social circle strangely exhilarates him—but he gradually gets tangled in a deadly web.

releases.title: Your Friends & Neighbors
releases.synopsis: When a financial titan suddenly finds himself divorced and jobless, he starts robbing his wealthy neighbors to stay afloat. Stealing from his own social circle strangely exhilarates him—but he gradually gets tangled in a deadly web.

releases.title: Ride the Wind
releases.synopsis: A chinese variety show which features 30 female celebrities all over 30 years old who must compete to debut in a seven-member girlsband.

releases.title: Tomorrow Is Ours
releases.synopsis: The story revolves around the people of Sète, France. Their lives are punctuated by family rivalries, romance and scenes from daily life, but also by plots involving police investigations, secrets and betrayals.

releases.title: 5 News at 19:55
releases.synopsis: National and international news

releases.title: Suidooster
releases.synopsis: Suidooster is a South African television soap opera produced by Suidooster Films which revolves around a matriarch, her family, friends and the people of Suidooster, a small shopping and business centre in the fictional Cape Town suburb of Ruiterbosch.

releases.title: 5 News at 5
releases.synopsis: National and international news.

releases.title: Elsbeth
releases.synopsis: After her successful career in Chicago, Elsbeth Tascioni, an astute but unconventional attorney, utilizes her singular point of view to make unique observations and corner brilliant criminals alongside the NYPD.

releases.title: Markus Lanz
releases.synopsis: TV presenter Markus Lanz invites prominent guests and experts from all areas of public life to his colourful talk show. As a rule, there are four guests, introduced individually to contribute their personal experiences to the topics.

releases.title: LIVE with Kelly and Mark
releases.synopsis: A morning talk show with A-list celebrity guests, top-notch performances and one-of-a-kind segments that are unrivaled on daytime television, plus spontaneous, hilarious and unpredictable talk.

releases.title: Sold Out on You
releases.synopsis: A work-obsessed cosmetics CEO and a top home-shopping host struggling with insomnia cross paths, and through an unexpected romance, begin to heal the emptiness in their lives.

releases.title: Ici tout commence
releases.synopsis: This television drama series is centered around the prestigious culinary school of renowned chef Auguste Armand. The show follows the lives of students and staff as they navigate the challenges and pressures of the culinary world—delving into their personal and professional lives, revealing secrets, rivalries, and complex relationships.

releases.title: Home and Away
releases.synopsis: Home and Away is set in the fictional town of Summer Bay, a coastal town in New South Wales, and follows the personal and professional lives of the people living in the area. The show initially focused on the Fletcher family, Pippa and Tom Fletcher and their five foster children Frank Morgan, Carly Morris, Steven Matheson, Lynn Davenport and Sally Keating, who would go on to become one of the show's longest-running characters. The show also originally and currently focuses on the Stewart family. Home and Away had proved popular when it premiered in 1988 and had risen to become a hit in Australia, and after only a few weeks, the show tackled its first major and disturbing storyline, the rape of Carly Morris; it was one of the first shows to feature such storylines during the early timeslot. H&A has tackled many adult-themed and controversial storylines; something rarely found in its restricted timeslot.

releases.title: Georgie & Mandy's First Marriage
releases.synopsis: Georgie and Mandy raise their young family in Texas while navigating the challenges of adulthood, parenting, and marriage.

releases.title: A Splendid Match
releases.synopsis: After years away from her family, Gu Jinzhao returns home and begins a remarkable transformation, from a carefree young woman into a poised and influential noble lady. As questions of marriage arise, she refuses to follow tradition and holds firmly to her own beliefs about love. But when multiple men enter her life, each offering a different future, who will Gu Jinzhao choose?

releases.title: Prisoner
releases.synopsis: A young and ambitious prison officer finds herself in the middle of a battle for the criminal underworld as crime lords try to evade justice. But in order to do that, she will have to learn quickly to put her faith in one of the very men she wants to put behind bars.

releases.title: Taskmaster
releases.synopsis: Greg Davies is the Taskmaster, and with the help of his ever-loyal assistant Alex Horne, they will set out to test the wiles, wit, wisdom and skills of five hyper-competitive comedians. Who will be crowned the Taskmaster champion?

releases.title: Tomb of Fallen Gods
releases.synopsis: The book takes the protagonist Chennan's search for his lover Yuxin 10,000 years ago and the pursuit of the secrets of the destruction of gods and demons as clues, leading to the vast six paths, heaven and earth chess game, and deducing a legend full of blood, heroic and poignant, telling the legends of countless heroes and beauties, and discussing human nature, society, life and other elements.

releases.title: Come Home Love: Lo and Behold
releases.synopsis: Hung Sue Gan starting from the bottom, established his own logistics company, which is now running smoothly. His only concern now are his three daughters. His eldest daughter has immigrated overseas. His second daughter Hung Yeuk Shui has reached the marriageable age, but has no hopes for marriage anytime soon. She is constantly bickering with her younger sister Hung Sum Yue, who is an honour student, over trivial matters, causing their father to not know whether to laugh or cry. Hung Sue Yan, Hung Sue Gan's brother, moves in with the family, temporarily ending his life as a nomadic photographer. He joins Hung Yeuk Shui's company and encounters Ko Pak Fei, the director of an online shop. The two appear to be former lovers, making for lots of laughter. Since Hung Sue Yan moved in, a series of strange events have occurred in the family. Upon investigation, the source is traced to Lung Ging Fung, a promising young man who is the son of department store mogul Lung Gam Wai.

releases.title: Become a Farmer
releases.synopsis: A labor documentary interactive reality show that selects 10 young individuals to form the 'Farming Squad,' which will authentically document their entire process of operating a farm on 142.8 acres of land over 190 days. This includes sowing, irrigating, fertilizing, and harvesting, as well as live-streaming their sales to establish a self-sustaining farmers' market.

releases.title: I Want You To Make a Disgusted Face and Show Me Your Underwear
releases.synopsis: A project where a number of women in different costumes show their panties while they make a disgusted face.

releases.title: Halef
releases.synopsis: A successful Istanbul surgeon who escaped his traditional Urfa roots is forced to return home when his family demands he assume leadership as agha and marry Yildiz to end a decades-long feud. Already secretly married to Melek, he becomes trapped between two women, two worlds, and a web of family obligations. As buried secrets surface, love, duty, and revenge collide inside a deeply divided and tradition-bound family.

releases.title: Diepe Waters
releases.synopsis: A South African, Afrikaans-language telenovela which takes place in and around a competitive swimming club, Die Swartmarlyne.

releases.title: Beat Bobby Flay
releases.synopsis: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobby's choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobby's strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

releases.title: This Old House
releases.synopsis: TV's original home-improvement show, following one whole-house renovation over several episodes.

releases.title: Emmerdale
releases.synopsis: The lives of several families in the Yorkshire Dales revolve around a farm and the nearby village. With murders, affairs, lies, deceit, laughter and tears, it's all there in the village.

releases.title: Terra Forte
releases.synopsis: Presumed dead for nearly twenty years, Flor reappears in Azores with a revelation capable of shaking the past and reshaping the present: her disappearance was not an accident, as everyone believed. The reunion with those who thought they had lost her forever, including a former love, reopens deep wounds and sets in motion a dangerous quest for justice.

releases.title: The Heir
releases.synopsis: A tribute ink scandal topples the Li family’s long-standing ink business, leaving their legacy in ruins. Years later, Li Zhen, the determined youngest daughter, sets out to restore her family's name. As she rises in the industry, she joins forces with Luo Wenqian, heir to another fallen clan, to take on a rising rival and face new challenges from foreign markets, fighting to bring Huizhou ink back to its former glory.

releases.title: Chronicles of the Sun
releases.synopsis: Claire is surprised when she gets arrested for the murder of her childhood friend after she returns to Montpellier.

releases.title: Germany's Next Topmodel
releases.synopsis: Germany's Next Topmodel is a German reality television show, based on a concept that was introduced by Tyra Banks with America's Next Top Model. The competition is hosted by Heidi Klum. She also serves as the lead judge and executive producer of the show.

releases.title: The Warrior Princess and the Barbaric King
releases.synopsis: Serafina, the West’s fiercest knight, expected torture when captured by barbarians. Instead, she got a marriage proposal! Marrying her sworn enemy is a hard no! But after seeing her wedding captor’s culture and very pretty face, she may be tempted to swap her sword for a wedding veil. Get ready for the ultimate enemies-to-maybe-lovers arc.

releases.title: Stellar Transformation
releases.synopsis: In a galaxy far away, there is a kid without innate ability to practice internal techniques. So, in order to gain the respect of his father, he resolutely chooses to follow the more difficult and painful path of practicing external techniques. As the years go by, he grows up, but what really changes his life is a mysterious meteoric crystal stone – the Meteoric Tear. This stone fuses with the young man’s body unnoticed, and he seems to undergo drastic transformations as a result. After that, everything is changed. Eventually his father knows that the son for whom he hasn’t really shown a lot of consideration possesses astonishing abilities. And there’s a lot more to come.

releases.title: The Ramparts of Ice
releases.synopsis: Weighed down by memories she can't shake, high schooler Koyuki Hikawa keeps everyone at arm's length — until three schoolmates draw her out of her shell.

releases.title: Fourever You
releases.synopsis: Four friends navigate college life and chaotic romances as they each find their hearts entangled with medical students across four unique stories.

releases.title: The Lead
releases.synopsis: Yi Qin'e is taken to the cultural troupe by her uncle Hu Sanyuan to learn to sing Qinqiang Opera. From then on, her life unfolds with ups and downs. She achieves glorious artistic accomplishments, yet also experiences a profound sense of loneliness beyond ordinary people's comprehension.

releases.title: Critical Role
releases.synopsis: Critical Role is a weekly actual play series that uses tabletop role-playing game mechanics as a means to explore and develop stories from the vast fantasy worlds of Exandria, Aramán, and beyond, with sweeping narratives intricately woven through collaboration between Game Masters and players.

releases.title: Welcome to Wrexham
releases.synopsis: Documentary series tracking the dreams and worries of Wrexham, a working-class town in North Wales, UK, as two Hollywood stars (Rob McElhenney and Ryan Reynolds) take ownership of the town’s historic yet struggling football club.

releases.title: Colony
releases.synopsis: Professor Se-jeong is thrust into a bloody nightmare when a rapidly mutating virus is released during a biotech conference causing authorities to seal the facility. Trapped inside with no escape, Se-jeong along with a small group of survivors must fight to stay alive while the infected undergo horrific transformations.

releases.title: Go for It, Nakamura-kun!!
releases.synopsis: Nakamura falls for his classmate Hirose instantly, but they've never spoken. Can his bumbling attempts to say hello lead to a real connection?

releases.title: The Game
releases.synopsis: The Game is a slapstick comedy following two childhood friends, Waseem and Mazo, who along with their families are unwittingly pulled into a game of pranks and challenges orchestrated by a mysterious stranger. Starring fan favourites Hesham Maged, Chico, Moataz El Tony, and Bayoumi Fouad, the series delivers non-stop laughs as the rivalry escalates across five seasons of outrageous schemes, family chaos, and hilarious confrontations.

releases.title: WWE Main Event
releases.synopsis: WWE Main Event is a professional wrestling television program produced by WWE that airs on Peacock and streams on Hulu Plus in the United States. The show features WWE wrestlers and complements WWE's primary programs Raw and SmackDown.

releases.title: CNN Headline Express
releases.synopsis: CNN Headline Express is a live news program delivering a fast-paced roundup of the day's top national and international stories, including business, sports, and entertainment, for on-the-go viewers.

releases.title: American Pulse
releases.synopsis: American Pulse is an hour showcasing reporting from the vast network of CNN affiliates across the country.

releases.title: In aller Freundschaft - Die jungen Ärzte
releases.synopsis: The spin-off to the original series 'In aller Freundschaft' focuses on the young doctors in a fictional clinic in Erfurt. In this emotional drama series, hospital staffers and patients navigate life's challenges.

releases.title: Beyond the Gates
releases.synopsis: A powerful and prestigious family reigns over a posh gated community with juicy secrets and scandals waiting to be uncovered.

releases.title: Kelders van Geheime
releases.synopsis: Kelders van Geheime (Cellars of Secrets) is a South African, Afrikaans-language telenovela based on the wheeling's and dealings of the community that lives on Soebatskloof (a wine farm in the Cape). releases.title: Stranger's Death
releases.synopsis:
**An Ordinary Morning, A Silent Change**
On a quiet winter morning in Delhi, a familiar routine breaks. The house feels different. The air feels heavier. What begins as an ordinary day slowly turns into a silent encounter with life, loss, and an unseen truth waiting to be noticed.
**A Stranger Who Was Never Truly Known**
Some people live beside us for years, yet remain strangers. Some endings arrive without warning. Through gentle observation and quiet moments, this story reflects on how easily we overlook the lives moving around us — until one absence suddenly becomes louder than any presence.
**A Mother's Wisdom, A Son's Realisation**
Through tender conversations and a mother's simple yet powerful words, the story explores how modern life has changed our idea of living. We run faster, we achieve more, yet breathe less. The past struggled to survive. The present struggles to feel alive.
**Still Breathing**
Stranger's Death is not a story meant to shock. It is meant to awaken. It speaks about forgotten pauses, unnoticed connections, and the fragile truth that we remember how to live only when something reminds us that we are still breathing.
Soft, emotional, and deeply human, this short story invites you to slow down — just long enough to see what you may have been missing all along.
Because sometimes, life does not change in loud moments.
It changes in silence.

releases.title: A Construção de Subjetividade Feminina no Romance Pequena Coreografia do Adeus, de Aline Bei
releases.synopsis: Este livro analisa a construção da subjetividade feminina no romance Pequena coreografia do adeus, de Aline Bei, articulando literatura contemporânea e teoria feminista. A partir de autoras como Simone de Beauvoir, Judith Butler, Heleieth Saffioti e Clarissa Pinkola Estés, a obra investiga como gênero, violência, maternidade, abandono e silenciamento atravessam a formação da personagem Júlia Terra. A análise destaca a escrita poética e fragmentária de Bei como forma de inscrição do trauma e da memória no corpo do texto. Ao evidenciar a literatura como espaço de resistência e elaboração subjetiva, o estudo contribui para os debates sobre autoria feminina e representação das experiências das mulheres na contemporaneidade.

The paper situates Felkin’s work within the intellectual and social context of Beeston, Nottinghamshire, and traces how these early influences informed later Golden Dawn Tarot structures.
